name: SCC_CreateCurrentDemandRes_DIN
title: SCC_CreateCurrentDemandRes_DIN
syntax: long SCC_CreateCurrentDemandRes_DIN ( byte SessionID[], char ResponseCode[], long NotificationMaxDelay, char StatusCode[], char Notification[], float PresentVoltage, float PresentCurrent, byte LimitAchievedFlags[] )
description: Creates a Current Demand Request message for sending.

parameters.name: SessionID
parameters.description: 8-byte long SessionID of SCC connection range: 0 - 0xFF FF FF FF FF FF FF FF.
